reason: The rule requires enabling FIPS mode by setting 'crypto.fips_enabled' to 1, which is only supported during system installation via the fips=1 kernel boot parameter. Attempting remediation on an already installed system is not supported by Red Hat and can lead to system instability, boot failures, or cryptographic service disruptions. This constitutes a high-risk FIPS mode change.
estimated_impact: reboot required; FIPS mode change; Kernel parameter modification; System installation required; Not supported on preexisting systems
